message:
chore(lab,beads): clarify gate_reject test name and sync closed bead entries

Renames gate_needs_evidence_below_threshold to
gate_reject_below_needs_evidence_threshold — the test verifies that
0.8 < 1.0 threshold produces Reject, not that it is promising. The
assertion is unchanged; this is a naming clarity fix only.

Syncs .beads/issues.jsonl: removes five closed/superseded bead entries
(1508v.11, 1ky3w.5, 1qfd0.432, 1sk16w.4, 1sk16w.5.1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
